external_references.description: Gianpietro Cutolo. (2025, November 26). Shai-Hulud 2.0: Aggressive, Automated, and Fast Spreading. Retrieved April 9, 2026.

Merav Bar, Rami McCarthy, Barak Sharoni. (2025, September 16). Shai-Hulud: Ongoing Package Supply Chain Worm Delivering Data-Stealing Malware. Retrieved April 9, 2026.

objects.description: [Shai-Hulud](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9008) has stolen access tokens and API tokens from with CI/CD pipeline solutions and repositories.(Citation: Netskope Shai-Hulud November 2025)(Citation: Palo Alto Unit 42 Shai-Hulud November 2025)(Citation: Wiz Shai-Hulud September 2025)(Citation: Socket Shai-Hulud November 2025)
